title: Apex-Unification Draft Publication Handoff Family Demotion
objective: Normalize the parent-root `apex-unification-001a` through `001i` draft-publication handoff family so those files no longer present themselves as still-live queue steps after standalone repo cutover and instead act as historical packet provenance with explicit current-routing redirects.
dependency_note: After Packet 190 closed the adjacent parent-root forms-import draft-publication handoff residue, the remaining live-looking parent-root draft-publication handoffs collapsed into one coherent unification chain from `apex-unification-001a` through `001i`. Each file already carried historical scope wording, but the titles, summary framing, `Why This Packet Is Next`, and follow-on sections still read like active queue instructions.
execution_scope: Retitle the apex-unification handoff family as historical provenance.
Add an explicit historical note and current-routing block to each handoff.
Relabel the live queue headings and present-tense queue wording without rewriting the full historical bodies.
forbidden_scope: broad handoff-archive rewriting beyond top-of-file demotion and heading normalization
success_criteria: The apex-unification draft-publication handoff family now reads as historical provenance instead of live queue steps.
Each file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and makes the next remaining live-looking residue explicit as the 2026-04-18 draft packet JSON family beginning with `pm-schema-020d`.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-04-22-parent-root-apex-unification-001*-draft-publication-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Parent-Root Apex-Unification-001[A-I] Draft Publication Handoff$','^Historical note: this handoff records one bounded parent-root draft-publication decision from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07\..*','^Current routing:$','^## 2\. Historical Why This Packet Was Next$','^## 9\. Historical Follow-On After This Packet$'

Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-04-22-parent-root-apex-unification-001*-draft-publication-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Parent-Root Apex-Unification-001[A-I] Draft Publication Handoff$','^## 2\. Why This Packet Is Next$','^## 9\. Follow-On After This Packet$'
next_action: Continue residue reassessment on the remaining live-looking 2026-04-18 draft packet JSON family, starting with `ops/agents/packets/draft/2026-04-18-pm-schema-020d-p6-baseline-xer-parser-and-loader-wiring.json`.
